title.zh-TW: 來源文件節點欄位定義

body.zh-TW: 來源文件節點包含以下欄位：`content_type` 為 `source_document`，`title_zh`/`title_en` 為原始檔名 + 匯入時間戳，`body_zh`/`body_en` 為完整的提取文本或轉錄稿，`visibility` 預設為 `private`，且 `source_type` 為 `human`。
body.en: A source document node has the following fields: `content_type` as `source_document`, `title_zh`/`title_en` as original filename + ingestion timestamp, `body_zh`/`body_en` as full extracted text or transcript, `visibility` defaulting to `private`, and `source_type` as `human`.
